name: David Grusch Serves in UAP-Related Intelligence Assignments
summary: From 2019 through 2022, David Grusch served in intelligence roles that included representing the National Reconnaissance Office to the UAP Task Force and later co-leading UAP analysis at the National Geospatial-Intelligence Agency, according to his congressional statement.

relationships.context: Represented the National Reconnaissance Office to the UAP Task Force
Assignments occurred within the defense and intelligence community

referenceSources.label: David Grusch written opening statement
